## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (max-warnings 0)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:run` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests in `src/tests/` for any change in `src/core/**`
- [ ] If bundle composition changed, `npm run size` still passes
- [ ] No PII or secrets in fixtures or commit history
